name: Incognito Tab Mover
description: Bidirectional tab mover: Normal ↔ Incognito. Use Alt+M for single tab or Alt+Shift+M for all tabs (Option+M/Option+Shift+M on Mac).
author: Rohit Wadhwa

move-tab.description: Toggle current tab between normal and incognito windows

move-all-tabs.description: Toggle all tabs between normal and incognito windows
